notes: Текущий сайт уже использует мягкие нейтральные цвета и студийные фотографии.
Внешний booking widget должен остаться конечной точкой CTA.

copyProfile.trustEmphasis: stylist expertise and recent client proof

paletteDirection: powdery neutrals with one cosmetic accent
typographyDirection: expressive display paired with restrained body text
imageryDirection: close-up service imagery instead of generic stock beauty shots
preservedConstraints: Preserve the existing external booking widget as the booking destination.
Do not introduce exact prices that are not verified on the current site.
assumptions: Team section may reuse staff names only if they remain visible on the source site.
